calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition For Order Authorizing Particular Transactions
Off Calendar Aug-03-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janis Carney and Lara Grisemer, via Zoom, for and with Charles Walker, Petitioner; Zachary McCoy, via Zoom, court appointed counsel, for Sylvia Walker, Respondent; Ashley Walker, via Zoom, in propria persona, Guardian Ad Litem.

The court acknowledges Mr. McCoy's declarations in support of the petition. Mr. McCoy advises that Ms. Walker had appeared via Zoom earlier this morning but was unable to wait until the matter was called. Mr. McCoy reports of discussing this petition with Ms. Walker and explaining to her what the petition is seeking specifically regarding the transmutation aspect of the petition and that Ms. Walker agrees with the petition and that he believes that Ms. Walker is capable of making that determination. The court confirms with Ashley Walker that she will not be requesting fees and that she supports the petition. The court confirms for the record that it is accepting service of copies of exhibits D thorough I. The court advises for the record that a court Investigator visited Sylvia Walker and that her report is in line with Mr. McCoy's position.

The court takes the Petition for Order Authorizing Particular Transactions under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Kahler. Not Reported.

***After hearing (Aug-02-2022): upon further consideration by the court, Ashley Walker is formally discharged as Guardian ad Litem.
